title: Washington Institute analysis: Israel-Lebanon Talks Round 4 — Pentagon security track significance for Hezbollah disarmament
snippet: Washington Institute analysis on Pentagon security track. The meeting involves military delegations focused on: Israeli army withdrawal, Lebanese army takeover of Southern Lebanon, financial support for LAF, Hezbollah disarmament, and enforcement mechanism for ceasefire. The 45-day ceasefire extension (announced May 15) created this parallel track alongside political talks (June 2-3).
tag_reason: Expert analysis of Pentagon talks provides new analytical framework — not previously covered
